brief_notes: Strong combination of causal (optogenetic) and correlational (electrophysiology) evidence. Tables are quantitative with accuracy percentages, d-prime values, SVM decoding performance, and temporal profiles. The link between neural discriminability and behavioral outcome is convincingly demonstrated. The phase task finding (decodable but not significant at population level) is nuanced and well-handled. Multisensory neuron findings add depth. Honest reporting of partial (33%) silencing effectiveness.
